title: Touchstone, AZB, Freshfields act on sale of Novartis India by Novartis AG
description: Novartis AG has sold its entire shareholding of Novartis India Limited, representing 70.68% of the equity share capital, to WaveRise Investments Limited, ChrysCapital Fund X and Two Infinity Partners (which form part of the ChrysCapital group).Touchstone Partners advised Novartis India on this transaction.The transaction team consisted of Yashasvi Mohanram (Partner), Sumnima Kataruka (Senior Associate), Associates Aayushi Jain and Niharika Mukherjee.Karam Daulet-Singh (Managing Partner) pro
